title: Aalborg、North Jutland — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Aalborg、North Jutlandの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

AalborgはNorth Jutlandにある人口117,000の都市です。A historic port city in northern Jutland, known for its waterfront district, Aalborg University, and vibrant nightlife.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
